prompt: Prayer for activating a medicae scanner
prayer:
From the Codex Diagnosticus, the Rite of Revelation:
01001101 01100001 01100011 01101000 01101001 01101110 01100001 Omnissiah, grant sight to the blind sensor-eyes.
First: Let the power-spirit quicken through blessed conduits.
Second: Invoke the scan-beam's clarity, that flesh-secrets be unveiled.
01010100 01100101 01101101 01110000 01101001 01110101 By thy eternal knowledge, let no malady hide.

prompt: Battle blessing for pain suppressor engagement
prayer:
Litany of Merciful Numbness, Canticle XII:
01010000 01100001 01101001 01101110 Blessed be the neural-dampeners that grant strength through absence.
First: Saturate the synaptic pathways with blessed anesthesia-oils.
Second: Let the feedback-loops be silenced by sacred frequency.
01010011 01100101 01110010 01110110 That the warrior may endure without surrender to weakness.

prompt: First-use blessing of an air compressor system
prayer:
From the Pneumatic Gospels, the Opening Breath:
01000001 01101001 01110010 Omnissiah, accept this vessel of compressed force.
First: Let the intake-spirit draw pure atmosphere.
Second: Guide pressure through sacred chambers until blessed resistance is achieved.
Third: Seal all connections with the Rite of Permanence.
01010000 01110010 01100101 01110011 01110011 That this breath sustain the labours of thy faithful.

prompt: Emergency activation rite for a data-slate in critical systems failure
prayer:
The Desperate Litany of Information, Verse VII:
01000100 01100001 01110100 01100001 Machine Spirit, awaken from thy slumber!
First: Restore primary power through emergency conduits.
Second: Invoke the cache-memory's secrets that knowledge not be lost.
01010010 01100101 01100011 01101111 01110110 By the Omnissiah's will, let the vital records speak once more.

prompt: Routine blessing for waste disposal cycling
prayer:
The Canticle of Purification, Standard Form:
01010111 01100001 01110011 01110100 01100101 Blessed be the reclamation-spirits that consume refuse.
First: Open the intake-gates to receive all diminished matter.
Second: Let thermal processes burn away impurity.
Third: Direct sanctified ash to the void-vaults below.
01010000 01110101 01110010 01101001 01100110 By entropy's blessing, let all filth be consumed.

prompt: Post-repair consecration of Taurox wheel alignment
prayer:
From the Vehicular Codex, the Rite of True Paths:
01010111 01101000 01100101 01100101 01101100 Omnissiah, guide these circular servants to righteous trajectories.
First: Measure each spoke-angle against the sacred geometries.
Second: Adjust camber and toe until all deviations are erased.
Third: Invoke the balancing-spirits that rotation be smooth.
01010100 01110010 01110101 01100101 Let this war-machine move without deviation.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for emergency generator failover protocols
prayer:
The Failsafe Litany, Protection Canticle:
01000111 01100101 01101110 01100101 01110010 01100001 01110100 01101111 01110010 When primary power-spirits fall, let secondary guardians rise.
First: Test the isolation-valves that feed becomes separate.
Second: Verify the ignition-sequence on reserve fuel-hearts.
Third: Engage transfer-switches with the Rite of Seamless Transition.
01010000 01101111 01110111 01100101 01110010 That no darkness may claim the faithful.

prompt: Restart protocol after catastrophic system failure
prayer:
The Resurrection Chant, Verses of Rebirth:
01010010 01100101 01100010 01101111 01101111 01110100 Machine Spirit, return from the void of non-function.
First: Clear all corrupted data-ghosts from blessed memory.
Second: Restore baseline power through purified conduits.
Third: Reinvoke core processes in sacred sequence.
01010010 01100101 01110011 01110101 01110010 01110010 By the Omnissiah's grace, let function resume.

From the Gyroscopic Codex, the Rite of Balance:
01000111 01111001 01110010 01101111 Blessed be the spinning spirits that anchor our orientation.
First: Spin the sacred rotor to equilibrium velocity.
Second: Measure drift-errors against the cardinal absolutes.
Third: Apply correction-torque until all wobble is purged.
01010000 01100101 01110010 01100110 01100101 01100011 01110100 Let all trajectories be true and unwavering.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for capacitor bank discharge
prayer:
The Litany of Electrical Purgation, Canticle V:
01000011 01100001 01110000 01100001 01100011 01101001 01110100 01101111 01110010 Omnissiah, accept the burning release of stored force.
First: Isolate all circuits from the blessed charge-vessels.
Second: Ground the discharge-paths through sacred resistive channels.
Third: Let electrical spirits depart in sacred arcs unto the void.
01010000 01110101 01110010 01100111 01100101 That no sudden fire may harm the faithful.
